info.english_meaning: to protect to hide to conceal
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: RO gopayati BAzArTe nindAyAM se jugupsate  gopAyed rakzaRe tvAye vyAkulatve tu gupyati ' (Slo. 129) iti devaH

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'bAlaBAvena saNguptaH SatruBiSca na DarzitaH' (BA॰anu॰5.22) saNguptaH samyagrakzitaH
'na cEva tizWAmi taTAviDezu narezu saNguptamanoraTezu' (BA॰anu॰5.14) saNguptamanoraTAH=pracCannakAmAH
'yadEtamanupaSyatyAtmAnaM devamaYjasA ISAnaM BUtaBavyasya na tato vijugupsate' (Sa0 brA0 147218) na vijugupsate=nodvijate
'icCatISaScyutAcArAn dArAniva nigopitum' (ki0 1519) nigopituM nigoptuM nigopAyitum pracCAdayitum
'tena naH sarvato'BigopAya' (Sa0 brA0 23440) aBigopAya gopAya rakza anarTako'BiH tadarTasya sarvata ityanenoktatvAt
'anAryA ye na jAnanti samayaM mandacetasaH teByaH parijugupseTAH' (BA0 SAM0 8311) AtmAnaM rirakzizerityarTaH iha nindAyAM sanna
